meta.title: Flat Fee Listings - Tidal Realty Services
meta.description: Real estate services priced honestly. Flat-fee listings for sale. No percentage-based commissions eating your returns.

hero.description: Traditional agents charge thousands in commission before you see a dime. At Tidal Realty Services, we offer a full-service MLS listing for just $999. That means professional support from listing to closing, without the percentage-based fees eating your returns.

process.title: What you get
process.description: When you list with Tidal Realty Services, you receive professional support throughout the entire sales process. Our goal is simple: maximize exposure while protecting your bottom line.

steps.title: MLS Listing & Syndication
steps.description: Your property gets listed on MLS and broadly syndicated to major real estate websites, reaching the maximum number of potential buyers.

steps.title: Pricing Strategy & Market Analysis
steps.description: We analyze comparable properties, local trends, and market conditions to position your home at the optimal price point.

steps.title: Showing Coordination
steps.description: We manage all buyer inquiries, schedule showings, and handle communication so you don't have to.

steps.title: Contract to Close
steps.description: From offer review and negotiation to closing coordination, we handle every detail of the transaction.

comparison.title: Compare our fees
comparison.description: Many of our clients are experienced real estate investors who understand that every percentage point matters. Here's how our flat fee model compares to the traditional approach.

traditional.title: The Traditional Model
traditional.description: Most agents charge 5-6% total commission, split between the listing and buyer's agent.
traditional.summary: That's $9,000 paid just to list your property.

tidal.title: The Tidal Model
tidal.description: We offer a flat fee MLS listing for just $999. Same service, fraction of the cost.

cta.description: Let's get started. Reach out and we'll walk you through the process.
